original_file: [GitHub] Your fine-grained personal access token is about to expire
email_subject: [GitHub] Your fine-grained personal access token is about to expire
email_body:
Hi Muhammad-Ali-Asghar-Rizwan,



We noticed your fine-grained personal access token "new token ", will expire in 1 day.



If this token is still needed, visit https://github.com/settings/personal-access-tokens/10969155/regenerate to generate an equivalent.



If you run into problems, please contact support by visiting https://github.com/contact



Thanks,

The GitHub Team
